    <Button class="p-button" label="Toggle Dark Mode" @click="toggleDarkMode()" >Toggle Dark Mode</Button>
  </nav>

</template>

<script>
import { Button } from 'primevue/button';

export default {
  components: {
    Button
  },
  methods: {
    toggleDarkMode(){
      alert('Hola')
    }
  }
}
</script>



<style>
